messages.author: J. Pelliot Dingle
messages.text: There's an active West Virginia MeshCore group on Facebook but I thought I'd put up a channel here. As I'm writing this message there's a few isolated islands of MeshCore around the state and a large mesh in Parkersburg that extends up and down the Ohio valley a ways and into West Virginia through Wirt County into the very northern end of Calhoun. I'm on a PSD board and have permission to mount repeaters on our hilltop water tanks which should give coverage across much of Calhoun County. We are hoping to be able to reach Spencer in the next county from hilltop to hilltop, too.

I'm on a PSD board and have permission to mount repeaters on our hilltop water tanks which should give coverage across much of Calhoun County. We are hoping to be able to reach Spencer in the next county from hilltop to hilltop, too.
